postDeployNotes: ProvenanceRegistryV2 has no admin role and no constructor args — it is a pure storage contract for content provenance + embedding commitment.
v1 (Base mainnet 0xdF47...9915) is unaffected by this deploy. Both registries co-exist; off-chain readers consult both.
Base mainnet deploy of v2 authorized 2026-05-06 by PRSM-CR-2026-05-06-2 (council ratification on existing evidence). Ethereum mainnet is still blocked unless a separate resolution authorizes it.
Copy this address into prsm/deployments/contract_addresses.json under <network>.provenance_registry_v2 before merging.
Operators who run V2Client set PRSM_PROVENANCE_REGISTRY_V2_ADDRESS to this address.
